markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and refine the Statement of Work (SOW) for GrowthX's engagement with Bubble, focusing on Phase 1 deliverables and strategy across multiple content channels.](https://fathom.video/share/esjc7qaLyrmL1n4V-z19oBxvs4hd5sr8?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Bubble seeks more specific language in the SOW for Phase 1 deliverables to ensure clarity and confidence in the partnership](https://fathom.video/share/esjc7qaLyrmL1n4V-z19oBxvs4hd5sr8?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - [GrowthX will revise the SOW to include strategy considerations for multiple channels (e.g., forum, YouTube, Reddit) beyond just high-volume content production](https://fathom.video/share/esjc7qaLyrmL1n4V-z19oBxvs4hd5sr8?tab=summary&timestamp=32.0)
  - [The teams aligned on the need for flexibility in execution while providing more detailed expectations in the SOW](https://fathom.video/share/esjc7qaLyrmL1n4V-z19oBxvs4hd5sr8?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [Bubble's procurement process requires a finalized SOW before moving forward, with potential for expedited processing if incentives are offered](https://fathom.video/share/esjc7qaLyrmL1n4V-z19oBxvs4hd5sr8?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)

## Topics

### SOW Revision and Clarification

  - [GrowthX to update SOW language, adding specificity to Phase 1 deliverables](https://fathom.video/share/esjc7qaLyrmL1n4V-z19oBxvs4hd5sr8?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Content roadmap to include strategy considerations for multiple channels, not just high-volume content](https://fathom.video/share/esjc7qaLyrmL1n4V-z19oBxvs4hd5sr8?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
  - [Removed specific article count (previously 3) as GrowthX will likely produce more](https://fathom.video/share/esjc7qaLyrmL1n4V-z19oBxvs4hd5sr8?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
  - [Will include at least one execution example for a chosen channel (e.g., forum strategy)](https://fathom.video/share/esjc7qaLyrmL1n4V-z19oBxvs4hd5sr8?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)

### Content Strategy and Channels

  - [Focus on editorial and on-site content production by GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/esjc7qaLyrmL1n4V-z19oBxvs4hd5sr8?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Strategy to consider Bubble's forum, YouTube, Reddit, and other channels](https://fathom.video/share/esjc7qaLyrmL1n4V-z19oBxvs4hd5sr8?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
  - [GrowthX to describe how they'll ingest information from various channels for ideation and opportunity identification](https://fathom.video/share/esjc7qaLyrmL1n4V-z19oBxvs4hd5sr8?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Bubble forum highlighted as a crucial source of user-generated content and potential SEO value](https://fathom.video/share/esjc7qaLyrmL1n4V-z19oBxvs4hd5sr8?tab=summary&timestamp=1173.0)

### Deliverables and Execution

  - [Phase 1 to include content audit, keyword analysis, and topic clustering](https://fathom.video/share/esjc7qaLyrmL1n4V-z19oBxvs4hd5sr8?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Execution phase (weeks 5-8) to produce minimum 5 articles per week](https://fathom.video/share/esjc7qaLyrmL1n4V-z19oBxvs4hd5sr8?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide examples of content strategy visualization (e.g., Airtable boards) and explain off-boarding process if partnership doesn't continue](https://fathom.video/share/esjc7qaLyrmL1n4V-z19oBxvs4hd5sr8?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)

### Procurement Process

  - [Bubble requires finalized SOW before involving finance and procurement teams](https://fathom.video/share/esjc7qaLyrmL1n4V-z19oBxvs4hd5sr8?tab=summary&timestamp=1576.0)
  - [Process described as "fairly complicated" with multiple departments involved](https://fathom.video/share/esjc7qaLyrmL1n4V-z19oBxvs4hd5sr8?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)
  - [Potential for expedited processing if GrowthX offers incentives or discounts](https://fathom.video/share/esjc7qaLyrmL1n4V-z19oBxvs4hd5sr8?tab=summary&timestamp=1590.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to revise SOW within 2-3 hours, adding specific language about channel strategies and expectations](https://fathom.video/share/esjc7qaLyrmL1n4V-z19oBxvs4hd5sr8?tab=summary&timestamp=1530.0)
  - [Bubble to review updated SOW and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/esjc7qaLyrmL1n4V-z19oBxvs4hd5sr8?tab=summary&timestamp=1427.0)
  - [Tatiana to follow up internally regarding potential kickoff dates and procurement process](https://fathom.video/share/esjc7qaLyrmL1n4V-z19oBxvs4hd5sr8?tab=summary&timestamp=1614.0)
  - [Discuss potential incentives or discounts to expedite the procurement process](https://fathom.video/share/esjc7qaLyrmL1n4V-z19oBxvs4hd5sr8?tab=summary&timestamp=1590.0)
  - [Align on a target kickoff date once SOW is finalized and approved](https://fathom.video/share/esjc7qaLyrmL1n4V-z19oBxvs4hd5sr8?tab=summary&timestamp=1612.0)
